description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure wearing a wide-brimmed hat and a scarf or bandana around his neck. The figure is posed with one hand on his hip and the other resting on an object, possibly a staff or tool, while one leg is bent and propped on a raised surface resembling a rock or mound. The figure is rendered in a realistic style, with detailed musculature and clothing folds. The base of the sculpture is textured to resemble rough ground or natural terrain. The entire piece appears to be made from a single material, likely stone or plaster, and is monochromatic with a matte finish. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or additional decorative elements.
description: A realistic sculpture of a standing male figure in a hat and scarf, posed with one leg raised on a rocky base. The piece is monochromatic and finely detailed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, hat, scarf, and the hand resting on a staff or tool, with the bent leg clearly visible on the rocky base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hat, the arm on the hip, and the contours of the figure's body and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure, the draped scarf, and the muscular detail, with the base and both legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the hand on the hip, and the staff or tool, with the rocky base extending forward.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
